llm_eval.notes: Independent re-verification (no re-edit). Enum drift genuinely fixed: agent convergence_status set == canonical phase3_output enum {complete,in_progress,diverging,human_escalate,incomplete} via machine set-equality (True) at L34/L72/L74/L93/L98; old invalid tokens converged|continue|escalated removed (0 occurrences). Field drift fixed: gate_results -> four_conditions{C1..C4} matching schema (gate_results absent). Dangling resolved: previously bare references/convergence-policy.json (would dangle from agents/ dir) now owner-prefixed run-elegant-review/references/; schemas/phase-output.schema.json, convergence-policy.json, validate-build-trace.py all exist. Owner integrity intact: agent wired in owner SKILL.md frontmatter, workflow-manifest.json subagent dispatch (phase3-execute), resource-map.yaml, elegant-4-conditions.json, agent-roles.md, prompts/R3-phase3-execute.md; R3 SSOT uses human_escalate consistently. Placement: lint-prompt-placement.py exit 0. Diff minimal (7+/7-, single file, findings-scoped, no unrelated edits). Correction to prior reviewer: R3 prompt does NOT mirror all 5 enum values by value (only human_escalate appears, 6x); the 'full 3-way mirror' framing is overstated, but enum-string-by-value duplication across agent+schema remains. Remaining: collapse enum/four_conditions to single-SSOT-by-reference (non-blocking style, out of minimal-fix scope).
